title: Peppermint Mexican Chocolate Churros
description: Crispy churros filled with a refreshing peppermint Mexican chocolate filling, perfect for a dessert or snack.
instructions: 1. Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
2. In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, confectioners' sugar, and salt.
3. In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, Mexican chocolate, peppermint extract, and heavy cream.
4. Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
5. Knead the dough for 5 minutes until smooth.
6. Cover the dough and let it rest for 30 minutes.
7. Pipe the dough into long strips and fry in the hot oil for 2-3 minutes on each side.
8. Drain the churros on paper towels and dust with confectioners' sugar.
9. To make the filling, mix together the Mexican chocolate and peppermint extract in a small bowl.
10. Fill a piping bag with the filling and pipe into the cooled churros.
11. Dust with powdered sugar and serve immediately.
